org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 ProtocolBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<ProtocolConfig,ProtocolBuilder>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ProtocolBuilder

  • public class ProtocolBuilder
extends AbstractBuilder<ProtocolConfig,ProtocolBuilder>
    This is a builder for build ProtocolConfig.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
